title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 417.310 - Receptacles — unlawful use
text:
417.310.  Receptacles — unlawful use. — It shall be unlawful for any person other than the one named in the certificate issued by the secretary of state as provided in section 417.300, without the written consent of the person named in such certificate, to fill any receptacle bearing the name, mark, or device recorded as provided in said section with milk, buttermilk, cream, ice cream or any other substance, or to buy, sell, give, take, dispose of in any way, traffic in or destroy any receptacle bearing any such name, mark or device.
(RSMo 1939 § 14089, A.L. 1955 p. 847) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12450; 1919 12021
